sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking (12,24)
seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Find 20px objects
print("20px objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 20:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']} 20px at ({cr},{cc})")

# Compare with before
before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
before_20px = {}
for n in before_seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 20:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        before_20px[(n['color'], cr, cc)] = True

after_20px = {}
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 20:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        after_20px[(n['color'], cr, cc)] = True

print(f"\nBefore 20px: {list(before_20px.keys())}")
print(f"After 20px: {list(after_20px.keys())}")

# Check last action result
print(f"\nState: {last_action_result.get('state', 'N/A')}")
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed', 'N/A')}")

# Check animation
if 'executed_actions' in last_action_result:
    anim = last_action_result['executed_actions'][0].get('animation', {})
    print(f"Animation: {anim.get('num_frames', 0)} frames, {anim.get('total_cells_changed', 0)} cells changed")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
